title: Heavy bombings across Tehran jolt its war-weary residents.
summary_full: Some people in the capital said the blasts on Wednesday morning were among the most powerful they had felt in more than a month of war.
summary_public: Some people in the capital said the blasts on Wednesday morning were among the most powerful they had felt in more than a month of war.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: more than a month of war
